name: ZYNEX INC
summary: PARTI History Zynex, Inc. was founded by Thomas Sandgaard in 1996, when he founded two privately held companies that were eventually folded into Zynex, Inc., a Nevada corporation. Zynex, Inc. is the parent company of two active subsidiaries; Zynex Medical, Inc. (ZMI, a wholly-owned Colorado corporation) and Zynex Monitoring Solutions, Inc. (ZMS, a wholly-owned Colorado corporation). Substantially all of the Companys consolidated revenue in 2024 and 2023 is attributable to ZMI. Our headquarters a...
